---

## 🛑 Security Issue Reporting
If you have discovered a security vulnerability, please do NOT report it here if it is critical. Instead, email the maintainers directly.

## Describe the Security Issue
A clear and concise description of the security vulnerability.

## Impact
Who is impacted by this vulnerability and what can an attacker achieve?
- e.g. An attacker can bypass role assignments.
- e.g. A user can join an arbitrary Jitsi room.

## Steps to Reproduce
Steps to reproduce the vulnerability (please be as detailed as possible).

## Possible Mitigation
If you have a solution in mind, please describe it here.
